title: SNAIL GARDEN 14 Big Heads Purple Artificial Calla Lilies with Green Leaves,Realistic Latex Calla Lilies with Removable Flower Heads,Real Touch Artificial Lily Flower for Home Wedding Office Decoration
features: 【14 Larger Flower Heads with Purple Colour】 Compared with other small heads and single stem calla lily, our lilies have larger heads with green leaves. Our flower heads are 26cm/10.23in in height and 12cm/4.7in in width.There is a yellow flower core in the middle and purple white petals ,unique purple, white and yellow to match, more beautiful and more realistic. In addition,the real touch flowers come in whole bunches with large green leaves, which not only fit into the vase in whole bundles without much effort, but can also be cut off one by one to match with other flowers

【 Lifelike Material 】The lilies flowers adopt premium latex material,real touch and natural-looking,and gorgeous purple-white-yellow colour matching,making it more lifelike and vibrant just like real flowers,giving you the perfect flower bunch for celebrating every important moment in your life.

【Detachable Heads,Bendable Green Stems】 The easter lily heads are detachable,not only can be inserted into our stems, but also can be taken out to make wreaths and bouquets, one flower can be used for two purposes. Our green stems are made of pu material, can be bent at will to meet your diy needs

【 Easier to Clean& No Smell 】Our lily flower heads are removable and you can clean them directly with a cloth or rinse them with water.The natural looking flowers never wilt and can be recyclable, always bright .And it has no smell,no need to worry pollen allergy, the artificial flower is friendly for who don't like strange smell.

【 Decor Anywhere/Anytime 】The fake lillies can be used in multiple scenes,perfect for home,office,garden,balcony decoration wedding bouquet and events decoration.Especially for wedding,shopping shop or decorating dressing tables,etc.
description: Product description Material: latex,plastic,wire Quantity: 1 bundles 14 heads Size: flower heads are 26cm/10.23in in height and 12cm/4.7in in width, and the length of branches is 50cm/19.6in Color: purple,white,green The calla lilies flowers can be used in multiple scenes,perfect for home decoration,office decoration wedding bouquet and events decoration.Especially for wedding,the realistic daisy is ideal for decorating tables,backgrounds,etc.And fake flowers never die , always decor your life without time limits Safety Warning This product contains latex, which may cause allergic reactions in some individuals. Keep out of reach of children and pets to prevent choking hazards. Handle with care and avoid contact with eyes and skin.
